title: Peter Bishop, Founder, SonaCMS

Expert at navigating both corporate and small business environments with a consistent focus on operational efficiency and ROI.Core Competencies"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"mcBvOtNtyR","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Strategy: Digital Marketing, Brand Positioning, Campaign Management.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Design: UI/UX Design, Print Media, Brand Identity, Advertising.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Technical: Web Development, Google Ads Management, Lead Generation.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Leadership: Business Operations, Stakeholder Management, Client Consulting.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"2-2CxqL1J_","type":"header","data":{"text":"Professional Experience","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"eBwdKJgIbb","type":"columns","data":{"cols":[{"time":1783815574924,"blocks":[{"id":"uHTVGyGLgr","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Founder & Strategic Lead | Tecky (and predecessor brands) 2006 – Present"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"48wuoJKqkt","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Directing all aspects of a boutique design and marketing consultancy, providing end-to-end solutions for diverse industries.
